# EmendaKit AS

EmendaKit is a Norwegian medical device company that designs and builds anaphylaxis kits ("anafylaksiskrin") for healthcare professionals. Founded by an anesthesiologist and a midwife with extensive experience in clinical practice and medical simulation. Designed and built in Norway by healthcare professionals. Tagline: "Innovasjon gjennom kunnskap og erfaring" (Innovation through knowledge and experience).

## Products

EmendaKit Hospital — Anaphylaxis kit for healthcare professionals. Used in emergency departments, ambulances, helicopter air ambulances, maternity wards, vaccination stations, and general practice. Waterproof, dustproof and shock-resistant transparent polymer case (IP-67) with a smooth, easy-to-clean surface. A fitted insert gives each component its own marked compartment, with a light-protective cover over the adrenaline ampoules. The kit is delivered without medications; adrenaline (1 mg/ml), antihistamine and corticosteroid are ordered through the hospital or clinic pharmacy. Includes the printed Norwegian national anaphylaxis flowchart on the lid, a QR code linking to two training videos, a "Ny kontroll" (next check) date field on the front, and a wall holder. Dimensions 320 × 230 × 95 mm, weight 1.4 kg packed. Price on request. Delivery time approximately 2 weeks. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/produkt/emendakit-hospital

EmendaKit Dentist — Anaphylaxis kit for dental clinics, including oral surgery and orthodontics. The same kit and framework as EmendaKit Hospital (320 × 230 × 95 mm, 1.4 kg), with a flowchart geared to the dental setting, where reactions to local anesthetics and latex are the most common triggers. Delivered without medications; a wall holder is included. Price on request. Delivery time approximately 2 weeks. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/produkt/emendakit-dentist

Custom kits ("behovstilpassede medisinske skrin") — Co-design service for healthcare departments with specific needs (maternity wards, vaccination programs, ambulance services, units with special requirements). Process: design conversation, packing proposal, pilot units, adjustment, delivery. Free initial design conversation by emailing kjersti@emendakit.no. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/tjenester/behovstilpasset

## Founders

Kjersti Grinde — co-founder, midwife, certified medical simulation facilitator. Specializes in quality improvement and clinical training in Norwegian healthcare.

Gregers Halvorsen — co-founder, anesthesiologist at Helse Førde, with experience from the Norwegian air ambulance service. Certified medical simulation facilitator.

## Clinical foundation

All products follow the Norwegian national anaphylaxis treatment protocol (revision 2024). The flowchart is printed on the back of every kit's lid: if staff do not remember how to manage anaphylaxis, the flowchart guides correct treatment. A QR code on the kit's side opens two short training videos. Training videos: https://www.emendakit.com/opplaering

## Contact

All inquiries: kjersti@emendakit.no
Quote requests: kjersti@emendakit.no (subject "Inquiry - EmendaKit Hospital" or "Inquiry - EmendaKit Dentist")

EmendaKit AS, Norway. © 2026.

---

# EmendaKit AS — English summary

EmendaKit is a Norwegian medical device company that designs and builds anaphylaxis emergency kits for healthcare professionals. Designed and built in Norway by healthcare professionals. Co-founded by an anesthesiologist and a midwife. The company's philosophy: an emergency kit is not a product, it is part of the procedure, and must be treated accordingly.

Two standard products: EmendaKit Hospital (for hospitals, ambulances, maternity wards, vaccination stations) and EmendaKit Dentist (for dental clinics, oral surgery and orthodontics; the same kit with a dental-specific flowchart). Plus a custom-kit service co-developed with healthcare departments.

All kits are waterproof, dustproof, shock-resistant and IP-67-rated, with a fitted insert, a printed national-protocol flowchart on the lid, a QR code linking to two short training films, and a wall holder. Kits are delivered without medications; the drugs are ordered through the hospital or clinic pharmacy. Pricing on request. Lead time approximately 2 weeks. Direct contact: kjersti@emendakit.no.
